page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Brig is a cross-platform (windows/mac/unix) application that can display circular comparisons between a large number of genomes, with a focus on handling genome assembly data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: BRIG is a cross-platform (Windows/Mac/Unix) application that can display circular comparisons between a large number of genomes, with a focus on handling genome assembly data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BRIG is a cross-platform (Windows/Mac/Unix) application that can display circular comparisons between a large number of genomes, with a focus on handling genome assembly data.
